name: Healthcare Payer
description: Health insurance plans, managed care organizations, self-insured employers. Heavy data exchange with providers, claims processing, member data at scale.
emphasis_areas: Claims data handling and minimum necessary
Data use agreements for analytics and actuarial
additional_required_policies: Data Use and Reciprocal Support Agreement (DURSA) Policy
additional_artifacts: Breach notification template and drill records
typical_gaps: Data use for analytics not covered by existing BAAs
Claims data retained beyond minimum necessary period

output_language_additions.breach_context: member notification, HHS reporting, and state regulator notification
